post.description: Retrieve a presigned URL for a file upload. NOTE:: You can generate presigned URLs yourself directly on your server. Use this endpoint as a last resort if you're unable to generate valid signed URLs yourself. You can read more about generating your own presigned URLs here and how to upload files using the generated signed URL here: https://docs.uploadthing.com/uploading-files
